name: Faux's Demonic Pact League Guide
author: Faux
description: 3,300+ points, 181 tasks. Faux's relics: Endless Harvest, Woodsman, Evil Eye, Butler's Bell, Larcenist, Culling Spree, Reload (Soul Harvest), Minion. Guide leans on these relics, adjust if running different tier 1/2s. Item buy quantities are intentional - don't buy more than mentioned because coins in inventory matter for some early tasks. Full video walkthrough: https://youtu.be/Job-3WdjVIs

customItem.label: Claim first relic (I'm going Endless Harvest) *turn off auto bank for now*

items.note: Turn off Run and back on
Pickpocket a Citizen (to level 5 Thieving)
Go inside house to the east, fill bucket at water pump
Run north, pet Renu
Bow emote near Renu
Travel with bird to anywhere
Home teleport (might put you in Yama's lair, leave to Varlamore again)
Run west, attack dummy to lv 8 attack
Run to Bazaar (market), cry near a child

customItem.label: Thieve full inventory of Cakes (need 14+)
Run northwest to General store
Sell 1 CAKE AT A TIME for maximum GP (not 5, 10, or 50), need 260+ gp
Buy 1 knife, 1 chisel, 1 spade, 2 bird snares
Run south to clothing shop, buy PINK SKIRT, Brown Apron, Red Cape (red cape is 2gp, others are 32gp)

items.note: Run straight south of general store to southern Varlamore wall. Kill rat w/ bow
Run east to altar, Salute next to Statue of Quoatlos (southern)
Run next to Altar, activate Thick skin
Run east, pet Xolo outside near Bird Bath
Drink from Bird Bath
Chop (or punch) 2 trees (Barb should get 15+ wc here)
Burn 1 log, fletch 1 log into arrow shafts

customItem.label: Run to east bank, deposit all, withdraw coins,

items.note: Enter Colosseum, run north and talk to gladiator
Exit, run north, talk to Port master (Sailing)

customItem.label: Run west and buy 10 buckets of sand, 10 soda ash, glassblowing pipe
Run south to furnace, make 10 molten glass, deposit at bank
Run back to charter, buy 10 more buckets of sand, 10 soda ash

items.note: Run to furnace, make 10 molten glass again, blow all glass into oil lanterns for 20 Crafting
Run to bank, deposit oil lanterns, withdraw Bucket of water (empty, keep bucket), air and mind runes, dramen staff -(equip), spade, pot

customItem.label: Run west to crafting shop, buy shears
Run south of Varlamore from the bank

items.note: Pick 6 cabbage (drop)
Kill 1 chicken, pick up bone
Run just south of the cabbage field and sit emote by the cabbage (near dogs)
Run west, pick sweetcorn (drop)
Give Molossus bones (north/northwest of sweetcorn)
Run west, pick and eat 1 onion
Run west, pick 6 wheat (keep 1) (drop 5)
Make flour in the windmill to the west (can drop flour)

customItem.label: Run northwest to Ortus farm, pick 6 potatos (drop)

items.note: Buy rake from Harminia (farming patch), rake flower patch
Run north, milk Dairy Buffalo
Run west, shear 1 alpaca

customItem.label: Run southeast to fairy ring
Fairy ring to Zanaris

items.note: Kill cow, pick up cowhide, bury bones

customItem.label: Claim slayer task from Chaeldar

items.note: Fairy ring to Aldarin (CKQ)

customItem.label: Run south, speak to Vineyard Foreman (near big wine vats), ask if he needs help
Search the grape vineyards for 4 shimmering grape vines (Vineyard helper Runelite plugin if you're struggling)

items.note: Speak to Vineyard Foreman to turn in, destroy grape barel

customItem.label: Run east to bank, deposit all
Withdraw coins (need 25+ GP), chisel
Buy chisel in General store to the north if you forgot to buy earlier
Run to crafting shop (northeast of bank)
Money making: Buy uncut sapphires, cut, then sell (1 at a time is 7x GP, 5 at a time is ~5x GP)
Stay as long as you want, upgrade to Emeralds and Rubies when possible. I plan to stay for ~50k gp, and return -later at
When done, buy 3 Sapphires, emeralds, rubies for later. Run east to charters

items.note: Buy 5 raw rabbit, tyras helm, bucket, tinderbox.
Cook rabbit at range southwest, eat once you get a cooked. Buy more if you failed
Kill a seagull

customItem.label: Travel at Antonia to Sunset Coast (Don't charter)

items.note: Buy torch in General store, Light torch and drop torch/tinderbox
Fill bucket at sand pit (north), drop sand

customItem.label: Run to Fishing Shop (Southeast, look at map)
Buy 1,000 feathers, big net (we'll buy more later)

items.note: Charter to Civitas Illa Fortis

customItem.label: Buy 15 pineapples from charter, bank them
Run south to pond ("Park" on map)

items.note: Fish until casket, old boot, and house key (Can skip house key and come back later, 1/10 might take a while)

customItem.label: Run northwest to bar
Buy 1 cup of tea, 1 Moon-lite, 1 stew, 1 jug of wine.

items.note: Drink Moon-lite, jug of wine
Run southwest, buy POH

customItem.label: Run southeast to mace shop, buy steel mace

items.note: Run to Civitas Bazaar, thieve from citizen 10 times without failing
Buy 1 silk from silk trader, sell it back
Run west near west bank. Give Oli a stew

customItem.label: Run to Quetzal (Renu), bird to Aubernvale (top left)

items.note: Drink cup of tea

customItem.label: Run south to bank, deposit steel mace, big net, tyras helm, bucket
Withdraw axe, knife, cowhide, wool
Run south to staff shop, buy Air and fire staff (equip)
Run west to Axe shop, buy Steel, Mith, and Adamant axe

items.note: Chop dead tree near river *EH toggle autobank on* (stay until 45 logs banked if endless harvest)

customItem.label: withdraw log from bank if EH

items.note: Make 1 plank at sawmill

customItem.label: Run southwest, tan cowhide into regular leather
Buy needle and thread in gen store

items.note: Admire beautiful logs just outside of gen store (east)
Step oin Ent trail (near maple trees to the south, wait for Ent to walk by)

customItem.label: Run south to nemus retreat
Claim Forestry kit from Forestry shop (southwest of nemus retreat near water)

items.note: Equip forestry kit to enable Forestry events while WCing (lot of forestry tasks)
Spin ball of wool, 1 bowstring

customItem.label: Endless Harvesters/woodsman can do the following, others can skip for now if you want:
Fletch headless arrows until 20 fletching.

items.note: Chop oak to the south until 60 oak logs banked. Complete Burn 1 oak log, Fletch 1 oak shortbow, fletch 25 oak -stocks, decorate oak totem (5 oaks)
Chop willows until 100 burn task, then toggle Woodsman burn off and bank 56 willows: 1 willow shortbow, 50 willow longbows fletched, decorate willow totem (5 willows)
Finish 1000 arrow shafts with extra oaks or willows
Chop 50 Maple logs (burn 25, bank 25)
Complete vale totem miniquest, bring 5 oak logs, 5 willow logs, 5 maple logs
Deposit all, withdraw coins, axe, 2 bird snares, green cape, steel mace

customItem.label: Run south to Rowboat, take boat to Tal Teklan

items.note: Run north to rune shop, buy 5 of each elemental rune pack, 5 mind rune pacts 5 cosmics, 75 natures 1 chaos pack, 1 death rune

customItem.label: Low alch anything for mage exp

items.note: Run west, buy purple dye. Dye cape purple
Run west, dance near Bards on the dock

customItem.label: Run southeast to ranged shop, buy 10 iron arrows, shortbow
Run to bank, deposit 5 nature runes

items.note: Run east out of Tal teklan, kill frog near Doom dungeon shortcut (shoot 6+ iron arrows)
Cut any regular tree

customItem.label: Run north across bridge, then east to Crimson Swifts

items.note: Catch 8 Crimson swifts (16 if not woodsman)

customItem.label: Run west to bridge, cross to the south then run southwest to Tropical Wagtails

items.note: Catch 15 Tropical wagtails
Take rowboat near Tal Teklan to Kastori

customItem.label: Run southwest to fishing shop
Buy small net, fishing rod, fly fishing rod, harpoon, lobster pot, 50 bait, fill inv with raw sardines

items.note: Cook sardines at range to the west (can buy more sardines if you didn't successfully cook 5)
Run southwest, fish shrimp until 10+ fishing (EH toggle off auto bank until several raw shrimp in inv, then back on, catch at least 1 if already lv 10)
Bait fish for Herring until 15 (catch at least 1 if already lv 15)
Net fish until Anchovy (stay until 16 fishing)
Run northeast, cook shrimp

customItem.label: Run northeast to Dungeon icon, climb ladder

items.note: Kill imp with earth spell, pick up ashes (save them)
Run north to Statue of Ates. Pet Caique (Bird on a rock)
Run north, observe the gemstone crab burrow. Get 20 attack on crab (steel mace), then train magic on defensive -until burrow (get at least 5 defence)

customItem.label: Take closest rowboat to Gloomthorn

items.note: Run east to Mons Gratia, kill icefiend (fire spells)
Run southeast to Quetzacalli gorge, kill 5 rabbits with mace, bury bones
Home teleport to Yama's lair, bury ashes
Hop 666 hoppy stones

customItem.label: Return to Civitas illa Fortis
Deposit all, withdaw coins, chisel

items.note: Run north to POH portal, enter build mode
Build cheapest room
Cut rubies at Gem shop. Goal: 70 crafting (Can leave at 60, but extra gp buys you runes in a few steps) (~400k gp profit)

customItem.label: Take boat to Sunset coast
Run north to helmet shop, buy bronze, and addy full helms.
Run southeast to fishing shop

items.note: Buy raw fish to complete cooking tasks: 50 tuna, 100 swordfish

customItem.label: Run north to Cam Torum
Buy 1 vial of water pack, pestle and mortar, 1 eye of newt pack at herb shop

items.note: Buy Steel, mith, adamant, rune pickaxe from mining shop (buy steel/rune if barbarian, probably need to equip for task - no idea how this will work)
Get haircut in building to the east. There's no Pink Skirt type thing hidden in this guide, instead, model yourself after Faux (Samurai, Maroon color haircut)
Trim beard (clean shaven)
Run to rune shop, buy 50 law runes, 500 natures, 100 death runes (more if you made extra money from crafting), extra elemental runes if needed

customItem.label: Low alch runes or junk while completing tasks for mage xp
Run east to bank, deposit herblore supplies (keep an offensive mage spells, keep bronze, steel, mith, addy, rune pickaxe
Withdraw big net
Run to pub, buy 5 Jug of wine
League menu tele to Varlamore

items.note: Run west to blacksmith, buy addy platebody/legs, bronze platebody/legs, mithril spear, steel platebody, iron dagger
Equip steel platebody, full bronze, iron dagger, mith spear.

customItem.label: Low alch steel platebody

items.note: Run south to bank, deposit addy, bronze, steel platebody, iron dagger. Withdraw 15 pineapples, bucket, chaos runes -(Wind Bolt is fine), big net (fill rest of inventory with jugs of wine, may only be ~3). Equip mith spear and keep it with you.
Run northwest to nearby dungeon icon, go downstairs and kill Guard

customItem.label: Go upstairs, run to western Civitas wall, then north to other dungeon icon
Go down ladder, run northwest, up ladder

items.note: Kill thief

customItem.label: Run south, milk buffalo

items.note: Run south, kill buffalo
Go into house east of allotments, churn butter
Pick up potato to the southwest, bake in previous house, add butter

customItem.label: Put 15 pineapples in compost bin, close lid

items.note: Pickpocket farmer until 3 potato seeds

customItem.label: Buy rake from Harminia

items.note: rake allotment patch, plant potatoes, buy 2 compost from farmer, protect potato patch
Run west, safespot dire wolf over plants
Run southwest, kill scorpion with mith spear
Mine 6+ tin ore, 1+ copper ore (stay until 15 mining)
Run southeast to Jaguars (east of Sunset coast), defeat without taking damage
Run southeast, kill a hill giant (Demonic pact point)

customItem.label: Run far east to Stonecutter outpost

items.note: Mine 1 clay, 50 iron, 20 silver, 2 coal, 3 gold, 50 mithril ore. Mine extra iron to get to level 55 for mithril
Run east to coast, big net fish for 20 Mackerel, 10 Cod
Run northwest to Oryx (northwest of hunter icon). Kill with melee (melee probably only needs to be killing blow, -try maging until last hit to speed it up)

customItem.label: Run north to Civitas crafting shop, buy tiara mould, ring mould, amulet mould.
Go upstairs, check for soft clay (1 min respawn on table). Take if there, otherwise can take bucket of water and withdra

items.note: Go downstairs, make anything on potters wheel, then fire at pottery oven

customItem.label: Withdraw 150 arrow shafts, 150 feathers. make 150 headless arrows (unless you made earlier)

items.note: Make at the furnace to the north: 1 Bronze bar, 15 Iron bars
Run northwest to anvil, smith 150 iron arrowtips
Run back to furnace, make 150 iron arrows on the way
Smelt 20 silver bars, make 20 silver tiaras

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw coins, dramen staff, jugs of wine. Buy extra wine at bar for thieving training
Pickpocket Farmer south of varlamore to 36 thieving
Run southwest to fairy ring, tele to Zanaris
Buy Slayer staff (for Death's coffers task), anti dragon shield. Wear shield.
Enter Puro Puro in wheat field (skip if you didn't get 17+ hunter earlier, come back whenever you feel like, it's not a
Claim butterfly net from Elnock Inquisitor (can drop jugs of wine)

items.note: Catch 50 implings in puro puro (spawn camp 1 baby or young impling spawn)

customItem.label: Teleport to Aldarin (CKQ)

items.note: Run to Ruby harvests to the west, catch 1

customItem.label: Go upstairs in house northeast of ruby harvests
After 40 thieving/2 gold bars, league menu tele to Varlamore

items.note: Run southeast to bank, withdraw amulet mould, ring mould, cut sapphire, cut emerald.
Pickpocket Guards until 28 coin pouches (don't open until you get all)

customItem.label: Open 28 coin pouches at once
Run to southern varlamore gate
Pickpocket master farmer south of Varlamore

items.note: Run east, defeat 3 chickens in 6 seconds (melee). Don't miss ticks. You can mage the 3rd for a better chance at a high hit if you're low str. You can cheese this by getting several to low hp and running away, then engaging when all 3 are prepped.
Run to bank, withdraw death rune, cast earth blast if 53 magic

customItem.label: Unlock Karamja if you haven't already
Open league menu, teleport to Karamja

items.note: Run to brimhaven agil arena. Complete 10 tickets
Leave arena, buy snapdragon from Jackie

customItem.label: Run to Karamja volcano, go to Tzhaar area

items.note: Safespot any Tzhaar (water spells)

customItem.label: Go upstairs, run to musa point
Pick 10 bananas
Ask luthas for a job

items.note: Fill crate with bananas

customItem.label: League menu tele to Karamja or charter back to brimhaven
Take cart to shilo
Run north across bridge, go upstairs to the east

items.note: Pay barkeep to sleep in Paramaya inn (may need to go upstairs to trigger task)
Take shortcut across river

customItem.label: Withdraw fly fishing rod, feathers

items.note: Fish 75 trout, 1+ salmon

customItem.label: Withdraw food, axe, small net, coins, slayer staff
Take cart to brimhaven

items.note: Kill snake near Fruit tree patch
Run south to brimhaven dungeon
Kill black demon in Brimhaven dungeon (safespot)

customItem.label: Karamja tele on league menu
Run south to Tai bwo wannai
Buy machete from General store

items.note: Speak to Murcaily to begin tai bwo wannai cleanup (near hardwood grove)
Cut dense jungle until fully depleted
Run south, catch a karambwanji

customItem.label: Teleport to Varlamore with the league menu

items.note: Run west to death's office, sacrifice Slayer staff to death
Buy buckets at general store, fill up supercompost at farming patch to the west
